title: ygogacha
description: Add simple OCG cards to Minecraft
body:
A lightweight mod for Forge 1.20.1, which adds a card-drawing simulation item based on the Yu-Gi-Oh! trading card game.

The first version includes approximately 50 well-known cards from Yu-Gi-Oh!, with future updates planned to more reasonably structure the card pack content.

According to the synthesis table shown in the figure, you can obtain the card pack of this module. Right click to get five completely random cards. Of course, the fifth card will have a random rarity, rainbow fonts, and enchanting light effects!

Please send an email to for any interesting suggestions or bugs that require feedback 1064695727@qq.com,Thank you for playing this mod!
